column3: Annual half-hourly meteorology since 1995 at the Auchencorth Moss Atmospheric Observatory (AU), Near Edinburgh, UK

column4: Centre for Ecology and Hydrology

column3: The Auchencorth Moss (AMo) field, South East Scotland (55°47’36” N, 3°14’41” W), is an ombrotrophic peatland with an extensive fetch at an elevation of 270 m, lying 18 km SSW of Edinburgh, and can be categorised as a transitional lowland raised bog. The site is grazed with < 1 sheep ha^-1.
